Hint:
  stave diagnose --controls testdata/e2e/e2e-30-prefix-unsafe-bucket-wide/controls --observations testdata/e2e/e2e-30-prefix-unsafe-bucket-wide/observations

Next steps:

  2. View a summary: `stave apply --format text`
